## Summary

Describe the observable problem and the resulting behavior.

## Product and architecture fit

- Explain any tradeoff involving the harbor metaphor, local-first behavior, precise inspection, accessibility, or live-event semantics.
- Note any architecture boundary affected by the change. Use `Not applicable` when no boundary changes.

## Validation

Check what you actually ran or inspected. Explain any omitted relevant check.

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Ran the behavior against a real or disposable repository, if applicable
- [ ] Checked relevant terminal sizes, color modes, or reduced motion, if applicable
- [ ] Updated documentation for behavior, terminology, setup, or limitations, if applicable

## Remaining limitations

List any platform, terminal, hosting, performance, accessibility, or live-event limitation that remains. Write `None identified` when appropriate.
